comment: Deterministic fix table (spec 16.2). fix_id is referenced from defects.json table_fix. resume_stage must match or precede the defect's resume_stage. implementation: dotted path the fix applicator will resolve once stage code exists (spec 16.3); listed now so the implementing model knows exactly what to write.

cleanup_mesh.description: bmesh cleanup: delete loose, dissolve degenerate, remove_doubles at 2x threshold; fill holes on closed topology

reunwrap_margin.description: Re-run Smart UV Project with island_margin x1.5; pack islands

reseam_stretched_island.description: Auto-seam offending island by angle (60 deg), re-unwrap that island only

decimate_to_budget.description: Decimate(collapse) ratio = budget/current x 0.97, re-run finishing pass

rescale_params.description: Move size params toward recipe bbox midpoint, clamped to schema bounds (param patch)

snap_sockets.description: Snap SOCKET_* empties to nearest 0.5 m grid point

merge_coplanar.description: Merge/offset coplanar overlapping faces (remove_doubles + tiny normal offset on detected pairs)

reattach_part.description: Re-run part placement with snap-to-surface for the named sub-part; else boolean-union pass

rebake_margin_x2.description: Re-bake all maps with bake margin x2; second offense handled by escalation (reseam)

relink_textures.description: Verify map files exist and pass stats; re-run material assignment + re-export; second offense: full re-bake

rebake_at_budget.description: Re-bake maps directly at the profile budget resolution

reexport_maps.description: Re-save maps with correct format/bit depth/color space, strip stray alpha

rebake_normal.description: Recreate normal target image as Non-Color float buffer, re-bake NORMAL pass with POS_Y swizzle

repack_orm.description: Re-pack ORM from channel bakes; snap metallic toward {0,1} per recipe declaration

rebake_periodic_snap.description: Re-bake with PeriodicCoords domain scale snapped to integer periods; second offense: increase pattern scale one step

redither.description: Re-quantize from float intermediate with stronger seeded dither

shrink_textures.description: Halve largest texture(s) until under the file-size cap (never below 64)

pole_fade.description: Switch skybox pole treatment param to 'fade' and re-render

resnap_sky.description: Snap sky pattern periods to integers over the equirect wrap; re-render

reexport.description: Re-run glTF export with canonical settings (uncompressed, tangents, whitelist extensions)
